entry.title: Re: DMEEx Remove spaces from one node/variable

Hi Antonin,

Thanks for your suggestion. I was able to do this with the use of Exit function.

entry.title: Limiting PDF Generation to Specific Documents in Print Preferences
entry.content: I'm trying to set up my Print Preferences in SAP, specifically in the General tab where there's an option to 'Generate PDF When Printing.' I want this feature to only apply to certain types of documents, like Incoming Payments. Can someone guide me on how to limit the PDF generation to specific documents, so that when I print an Incoming Payment, it generates a PDF with the layout selected for the print, but this doesn't happen for other types of documents? Thanks in advance for any help!

entry.title: How do i modify Day type if there's IT2007 record on the selected day
entry.content:
Hello, 

How do i write a PCR with a requirement if the employee has IT2007 Attendance Quota 02 then the day type for the selected day will change from 1 to 9?

Thank you

entry.title: Re: Subtitution Doesn't Replace Pre-existing Work schedul...
entry.content: I tried to explain to them that using subtitution will overwrite the original work schedule. I think they don't like the idea of that. And how do i dynamically assign a different DWS in time evaluation? Thank you

entry.title: Re: sap mdk action bar style navigating from object list...
entry.content:
The Action bar button color is controlled through the action bar style.  Try setting both ActionBar and ActionBarTitle styles. I tested using MDK 24.4 and it worked as expected.

ActionBar {
    color: #008390;
}

ActionBarTitle {
    color: #008390; 
}

entry.title: Re: Template Feature of Document Information Extraction
entry.content:

I try to process invoices and I want to cover the cases that already exist + new formats that the pre trained may not cover.

Please consider my application for the same.

Thanks much for this opportunity,
Snigdha.

Thanks a lot!

entry.title: Re: Inspection for customer returns in public
entry.content:
Hi @Suresh_Eswaran,

Inspection Type 06 is not supported in SAP S/4HANA Public cloud.

As an alternative, you can use inspection type 05 for Lean return..

Steps to Execute:

1) Enable inspection type 05 for that return material in material master

2) Create Customer Return sales order

3) Created delivery for the Cutomer return Order.

4) Inspection lot will be generated

5) Post Goods Receipt will be restricted without completing Usage Decision (UD) for the 05 inspection lot.

6) Complete UD for the 05 inspection lot.

7) complete picking and the delivery by posting 653 movement. 

Hope this helps. If you find this answer helpful, please mark this reply as answered.

Thanks,

Prabha A

entry.title: Re: SAP Business One , Android Mobile troubleshooting is...
entry.content:
Hi nikunjmehta2290 

In mobile app troubleshooting too, please check if you have defined company database correctly. If yes then please check if company database DI and JDBC test connection is successful from B1if -> SLD.

Thank You.

Kind Regards
Nidhi Singh
SAP Business One Support

entry.title: Re: Strategy profile
entry.content: Thanks yasmin for your valuable reply- I have a point to make - if I fix a strategy at two places - one at SPRO Level and other at user specific settings level- while running a scheduling problem which will take precedence or which will level will be considered for run

entry.title: Re: Regarding refresh job options
entry.content:
Hi @Rajani ,

External in this scenario refers to users that are not employees in your instance. This could be contingent workers or applicants in the recruitment process.  It could also be external users for LMS.  In essentially all scenarios I can think of you would always exclude external employees which is why the box is checked by default.

Hope this helps

Christian

entry.title: Re: Payrange report
entry.content:
Hi Sneha,

Yes you can report on this by creating a table report in Report Centre and using the Foundation Objects domain to pull the pay ranges and associated paygrade.

Thanks,

Christian

entry.title: Re: Destination Service failed after deployment - Cloud F...
entry.content:
Hi,

Please check your definition for the "existing_destinations_policy" configuration from the mta.yaml.

See more information here: https://help.sap.com/docs/connectivity/sap-btp-connectivity-cf/create-destinations-using-mta-descriptor

Thanks,

Rotem

entry.title: Re: SAP Process Integration (SAP PI PO) Local rule routin...
entry.content:
You can combine AND with OR - but in the way SAP has foreseen it, it will not help. You can setup like 
(a = 1 AND b = 2) OR c = 3
But there is no way to set up like:
(a = 1 OR a = 2) AND ( b = 3 OR b = 4 )

You can either combine it like:
/something/a['1' or '2']/something/b[ '3' or '4']  EX

Or you are creating an extended receiver determination where you can use XSLT (or Graphical ...). 

Hope that helps? 

BR Helmut

entry.title: Re: SELECT DISTINCT SQL for Projects
entry.content:
Hi,

DISTINCT will only group everything into one row, when all columns have the exact same value over all rows. In your example data the values in the diffrerent columns are all different, so you cannot use distinct.

You have a few options that you can use alone or in some combination:

  • Add a WHERE clause to get the specific row you want. For example WHERE "Year" = 2015
  • Add an ORDER BY clause, and TOP 1. So something like this: 
    SELECT TOP 1 "Project"...etc
    etc
    ORDER BY "Year"
  • Select less columns, and the COUNT() or SUM() function(s). For Example SELECT "Project", SUM("Labour Budget") AS "Labour Budget" FROM etc.

Regards,

Johan

entry.title: Re: New or not to the SAP Community, share your story!

entry.title: Interpretation issue - with MD04 vs RRP3-Missing Quantity in RRP3-
entry.content:
Hello Team ,

I am at entry level - I understand RRP3 is a replica for MD04- the data should be the same- replicated perfectly rite !!

But i don't see that perfection here -there is some discrepancy as presented below- I have simply copied the data's as it is for consumption-

if you take a close look at the available quantity- what is in S4 468 and APO 434 there is Loss of available Quantity where did the balance (468-434 ) =34 go, 34 is missing - can you please help detect the cause of missing quantity ? OR logic behind missing Qty.

Second sub-question 

0033014174/STCK- can you help decode 0033014174/STCK- does it mean the planned order has been created from STCK (stock) ?

Details picked up from MD04  Screen.

MD04 status as on -13/05/2024 – IST (System date today date )

Date -  15/05/2024

MRP element -PLdORd

Opening date -14-05-2024

MRP element data- 0033014174/STCK

Receipt/Reqmt -144

Available Quantity- 468

Storage location -WE01

Details picked up from RRP3 screen details 

Start date- 14-05-2024

Start time- 17.49.38

Category- Pl.Ord

Receipt/Reqmt  element -0033014174

Manufacturing process- 20

Available Qty/Req Qty 15.05.2024

Avail/reqT-18.03.2024

Req- req Qty – 144

Total Qty- 144

Available Qty- 434

Surp/Short – 144

 

Resource-WK-12-UTY

entry.title: Re: TOTAL CONSUMPTION VS SALES QUERY
entry.content:
Hi,

Right off the bat, I don't see anything wrong with your query. I rewrote it, to make it easier to read, and I added a few very small tweaks to better catch NULL comparison errors:

SELECT T1."ItemCode"
      ,T1.ItemName
      ,SUM(ISNULL(T1."IssuedQty", 0)) AS "Consumed In Production"
	  ,SUM(ISNULL(T2."Quantity", 0)) AS "Sold Quantity"
	  ,SUM(ISNULL(T1."IssuedQty", 0)) + SUM(ISNULL(T2."Quantity", 0)) AS "Total Consumption"
FROM "WOR1" T1
      INNER JOIN "OWOR" T0 ON T1."DocEntry" = T0."DocEntry" AND T0."Status" IN ('R', 'L')
	  LEFT OUTER JOIN "INV1" T2 ON T1."ItemCode" = T2."ItemCode" AND T2."docDate" = T0.PostDate
	  LEFT OUTER JOIN "OINV" T3 ON T2."DocEntry" = T3."DocEntry" AND T3."DocDate" = T0.PostDate
WHERE T0.postDate BETWEEN '2024/01/01' AND '2024/01/31'
GROUP BY T1."ItemCode",T1.ItemName
ORDER BY T1."ItemCode"

If the values seem off to you, I recommend that you single out single item, and look up the sales and production data related to that specific item. I.e. calculate the values manually for one item, to see if the query gets it right or not.

One small thing it may be, is that the result does not match your expectation because you used T0.PostDate. Perhaps you need to use one of the other date fields.

Regards,

Johan

entry.title: Re: does billing plan can active internal order?
entry.content: NO, It isn't custom, the screen shot is standard.

entry.title: SAP Stammtisch Melbourne May 2024
entry.content:
The first Melbourne Stammtisch (regulars table, read more about it here) of 2024 had a great vibe and it was so good to get together and enjoy great food and conversation. The sentiment is to keep the good times rolling about every two months. Read more about it in the post from @BenPatterson : https://community.sap.com/t5/melbourne-blog-posts/sap-stammtisch-melbourne-may-24/bc-p/13698292#M97 

Leave your RSVP now! When you arrive, if you can't find us you can ask for a booking for the "SAP Regulars Table" 😉

Join also the Melbourne Group to connect with other local peers.

greetings

 

I am facing errors in the material management FI integration  can you help me out

'

Regards 

aswanth

entry.title: Re: Replication Flow Blog Part 6 – Confluent as Replication Target
entry.content:
As you create the schema based on the table structure, what is the Avro schema field name if the table column is called "/BIC/ABCD"? Avro names are limited to A-Z, a-z, 0-9 and _ chars. No other chars are allowed. No double byte chars, no minus, no $ and no /. Hence these column names must be encoded automatically or such a table will cause the entire replication to fail.

I have not seen this encoding scheme to be documented anywhere but the consumer requires that.

https://avro.apache.org/docs/1.8.1/spec.html#names

This library https://github.com/rtdi/KafkaAvro helps with that also.

entry.title: DMEEx XML how to not delete spaces in atom/node
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

Currently facing an issue when I try to add constant spaces on a node in the XML.

My requirement is to apply 5 spaces to the output. I have debugged program SAPFPAYM and saw that the spaces were being applied to the fields.
But when i try to print in F110 the added spaces are removed.

I have also tried replacing the spaces with Alt+255 but when checked on notepad++ it shows this symbol:

Output: 

expected: 


Thanks in advance

entry.title: Renewal of custom domain certificate using the Custom Domain Manager app
entry.content:
Introduction

As I used certbot to sign my custom domain certificate it is only valid for 3 months and I need to renew it.

Last time, I used the CF CLI plugin for custom domains because CLI is just cool but also because I didn’t know if the custom domain manager application is free or costs extra. Nevertheless, I wanted to use the custom domain manager application for the renewal of the certificate to compare it with the CLI.

Preparation: Activate the custom domain manager application

First, make sure you have the entitlements in your subaccount for this:

Now, you should be able to subscribe to the Custom Domain Service with plan standard in your subaccount:

Once subscribed, your subaccount contains new roles. Assign the Custom Domain Administrator role to your user:

With the authorizations you can start the application. Go to "instances and subscriptions" to find the Custom Domain Manager in the list of subscriptions. Select the line and you’ll see the button “Go to Application”. This button will bring you to Custom Domain Manager application:

Renew certificate – Try 1

My expectation was that I would be able to simply renew the certificate in the earlier created private key. Unfortunately, I didn’t find any button in the screen of the private key to do so, no option to request a new CSR, no update certificate,... .

Renew certificate – Try 2

This brought me back to the CF CLI where I tried the command to get a new CSR:

This one clearly stated that the CSR is not available anymore.

Renew certificate – Try 3

So I tried to use the previous retrieved CSR again (which I stored on my computer) to send it to certbot for signing:

Once signed, I tried to upload it to the same private key which resulted in the following error.

Renew certificate – Final try

When looking for SAP notes about the previous error message I found the following SAP note:

https://me.sap.com/notes/3233828

This says it is not possible to use the same key for updating the certificate with a reference to the documentation: https://help.sap.com/docs/custom-domain/custom-domain-service/update-certificate

This means we need to create a new key every time we renew the certificate and delete the previous one afterwards:

With this new information, I went back to the “Custom Domain Service Manager” application:

In the app I navigate to the tab “Server Certificates” followed by “ Create Server Certificate for your Custom Domains”:

This starts a wizard where I provided the following information:

  • Alias: a name that contains the month and year for the certificate
  • Key Size: I kept the default “3072”

Select the landscape to apply the custom domain on:

I also used the opportunity to use “*.lemaire.tech” as main domain. This allows me to use wouter.lemaire .tech but also other subdomains for “lemaire.tech” without always to have “wouter” in it😊 . So I selected the following two:

All the details for the subject:

Once the wizard is finished I was able to download the CSR:

This opens a dialog with the certificate which you have to copy into a .pem file:

This CSR (.pem) file can be used to sign it with certbot using the following command. The steps are the same as the first time when using CF CLI. The command to sign it with certbot:

certbot certonly --manual --csr ./csr.pem --preferred-challenges dns

During this process I had to apply the following config in the custom domain configuration of google domains:

Once saved it looks like this, it still contains the previous acme record in my config:

This generated again a certificat chain that can be uploaded to BTP in the Custom Domain Manager:

In the Custom Domain Manager app I had to paste the certificate from the file. Certbot provided me 3 files but only the last one is needed:

Validate the certificate and click on next step:

The last step is just for confirmation, just click on Finish:

This will result in two certificates, one that will expire soon and one which is inactive (the one you just created):

Activate the new Certificate

Click on the newly created private key and click on “Activate”:

This opens a new wizard where you need to select the Subject Alternative Names which you would like to activate. I only selected “*.lemaire.tech” because I want to use it for other subdomains but not the “lemaire.tech” domain itself.

I just continued with the default TLS configuration:

Validate the summary and confirm!

Final step, configure the domain in your custom domain manager (I use google domains for this):

Cleanup

Once the new certificate is active, you can delete the previous one. Navigate to the previous certificate and click on delete:

After cleaning up, you should have one left:

Result

I have my personal website running using this domain: https://wouter.lemaire.tech

Next to that, I also used to domain to make an easy to remember url for the BTP Service overview matrix application: https://btp-services.lemaire.tech

 My conclusion, the Custom Domain Manager application works great and makes a lot of the steps easier to execute. Nevertheless, using the CF CLI helps to better understand all the steps you need to execute. In the end, the application executes the CF CLI commands through an API with a UI on top of it which makes it more user friendly 😉

entry.title: Re: SAP Business One. Can I determine Last Evaluated Price?
entry.content:
Thank you Abdul,

1. I do not understand why multiple UoM is a good option, but I will look into that. For now, my understanding about multiple UoM is: we put 1 box on a purchase order and we will have 1000 pcs in stock when we turn the purchase order into A/P invoice, is that right?

2. Yeah I tried avoid moving average so I disassemble a box only when the individual quantity is 0. I though SAP will give individuals a value simply according to the cost the box, because there is no value last. But no SAP still assign an historical value and make journal for the difference.

 

Best regards,

Francis

entry.title: Re: Mass Creation of Job Requisition
entry.content:
Hi Arren,

Yes

1. We can create mass job requisitions via API ( Use the Job requisition entity). We have implemented this for many of our customers.

2. For one of the customers we also implemented RPA solution.

You can refer to Scenario 3 of the Blog.

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/enhancing-the-system-behaviour-of-successfactors-with-sap-intelligent-rpa/ba-p/13496892

 

Thanks

 

Kunal

entry.title: Re: S_ALR_87013611 Report Painter report to Internal Table
entry.content:
Hi,

Make sure that the report program that you are trying to call is outputting the data when run with the same selection screen data that you're passing with submit command. Call cl_salv_bs_runtime_info=>get_error after calling get_data_ref to see if there was any error encountered during data capture

entry.title: Re: SFTP receiver - error Cannot store file cause: java.i...
entry.content:
Hi,

The issue probably occurred when the interface began writing/uploading files simultaneously to the SFTP server. Essentially, it's like attempting to upload two files at the same time

Regards,

Naveen

entry.title: Re: Can you remember the first time you heard of SAP
entry.content: Great having you @Sohit_Kalluru and we are looking forward to your contributions here. You might be a great expert with such a long experience around SAP topics. 👍

entry.title: Re: Periodic LSMW or RPA?
entry.content: Yes, it's possible to use RPA to automate this process. We can leverage software such as Power Automate Desktop or other RPA tools to create bots that handle the file upload (.txt) and data update in SAP automatically. This will help reduce the time and effort required by individuals and can also operate during non-working hours, enhancing overall efficiency.

entry.title: Re: Let's meet-up in Poznań 🍻
entry.content: Great you had the chance again to meet 😊👍

entry.title: Re: Navigation menu color

Hi Chris,

We could customize the navigation bar like below by using the Responsive Navigation Bar component and creating a Custom style inside it.

You can look other details about the app from our website.

https://riftsoft.com/Products/RiftMobile

 

 

 

 

Best Regards,

Ali

entry.title: Whether inventory data can be extracted to GR Internal inventory gross value?
entry.content:
When customer try to calculate Interunit Elimination of Profit in Inventory ,they need to input buying unit data :IPI-Internal inventory gross value  and selling unit  IPI-Margin Rate (%) . They could use template to upload this data. However Customer want to know whether they could extract data from MM module automatically to reduce users' workload.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Whether inventory data can be extracted to GR Interna...
entry.content: Sorry we cannot support such functionality so far. You have to input data for the related FS item manually based on Example for Interunit Elimination of Profit in Inventory

entry.title: Re: AATP-BOP runs without selecting and updating any sale...
entry.content:
Hi Satish,

The BOP does not process anything due to a technical error -> check the BOP log in the BOP Monitor APP. It should provide you further details. The SM37 spool does not show the same information as the BOP log.

You may verify also my FAQ KBA 2589424 FAQ: Backorder Processing (BOP) with aATP - for further help.

best regards,

Michael

entry.title: EHS Data Migration for SAP S/4hana on-premise
entry.content:
Hi,

We want to migrate the data of the EHS module in the S/4hana on-premise system using the staging table method—data such as chemical substance, risk, control, and compliance requirements for OEL. There is no standard template for these data in the Migration Cockpit app. I would be grateful if anyone has a solution for this problem.

Regards

entry.title: Re: Customs Export Declaration report in GTS
entry.content:
Hello Yurika,

as far as I know such a report is not existing. So you need to create it by yourself and add all data from tables /SAPSLL/CUHD*, /SAPSLL/CUIT* and /SAPSLL/LEG* by yourself.

For report /SAPSLL/CULO_DISPLAY_CUS_EXP maybe this indicator on selection screen helps your users to get some information on item category level.

For getting information about the reference documents (Sales Order, Outbound Delivery, Proforma Invoice) you could use report /SAPSLL/CORFLO_MONITOR_EXP (t-code /SAPSLL/CORFEX_DISP).

BR
Fabian

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)

entry.title: Re: How to create New Account group in SAP Public cloud W...
entry.content: You can create with the names like:

entry.title: Re: How do you like new SAP Community pages (Blogs) look & feel?
entry.content: All feedback and commentary is being collected, and looked at. Until we have concrete plans though we don't want to just say "we are working on it" we also want to ensure we change what needs to be changed and not just give people a chance to see how the new platform works.  Change is there and there are some things like the filtering that are absolutely being worked on whereas some other things are simply different than what they used to be. A complete UI/UX work up is being put together and will hopefully be available soon for feedback and testing like we did prior to the migration for those who participated.

entry.title: Re: Even more Flexibility in Adaptation using Screen Personas Scripting with Mobile RF Devices in Wa
entry.content:
Hello @shashankagg,

I am not aware of way to have an immediate update upon entering "F". It might be that a Screen Personas Scripting expert has a hint.

For restrictions please check the Screen Personas help depending on your deployment option. For S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition you could check the following links:

  • Administration guide - assignment categories
  • Administration guide - manage UI adaptations

Best regards, Tobias

entry.title: Re: Final Review Step in Onboarding 2.0 Process
entry.content:
@SachinPachauri 

Thats a great blog and details shared will truely make the config clear.

Though I have two questions regarding the behavior of this step -

Q1 - Once request correction is done, then one email will trigger to Candidate and PDC is repoen for them. So now when Candidate will open PDC step, prefilled information will be visible or candidate has to fill all details again. (I assume it will be prefilled based on the values added earlier).

Q2- Once request correction is done, values given in ADC step will remain as is or that again candidate has to fill n update? this is because in Onboarding restart scenarios, we can't keep ADC data and candidate has to re submit ADC information again.

 

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: SEN. User password
entry.content:
Hi, could you help, please,

  1. SEN - Cloud
  2. SSO - has not been configured

Question:

Is there a way to download the list of all users With the current  passwords?

entry.title: Re: Characteristics-Based Dispatching in SAP Digital Manufacturing Resource Orchestration
entry.content:
Good Blog Post.

Thx for sharing

entry.title: Re: Adding SAP Cloud ALM to "Instances & Subscriptions" i...
entry.content:
Hi again, 

As per your screenshot you are not in the BTP Global Account for SAP Cloud ALM...

You need to be able to logon there.

Best regards,

Dolores

entry.title: Re: Error : Consolidation group is not defined for storag...
entry.content:
Hi,

"2. Activity area updated with consolidation group"

And this is assigned to the bins in the final storage type? Sorting defined? Sorting done (do you see the activity area with the correct activity in the bin)???

Brgds

Juergen

---
All the above is no official SAP statement.

Want to learn EWM?
Check for EWM courses: https://training.sap.com/trainingpath/Applications-Extended+Warehouse+Management-EWM+in+S4HANA
Get a SAP Learning Hub Subscription: https://training.sap.com/learninghub

And it is EWM. NOT eWM - Duh!
And if your question includes the word "transfer order" - do NOT tag the question with Extended Warehouse Management!

entry.title: Re: Function module CNV_PE_S4_RFCFM_ORG_DERIV missing?
entry.content:
Hi Christian,

please check first if all notes have been implemented. Use SAP note analyzer: https://me.sap.com/notes/3016862 

in Backend: Transaction CNV_NA_MC

best regards, Sybille

entry.title: Re: GUI oddities with new 2022 ABAP Trial
entry.content:
Yes, as noted in 3. (not really via SE38 but close)

Thing is, it never happened before.

entry.title: EWM POSC RF Repack
entry.content:
Hello, 
please advise if and how its possible to add HUs on the pallet HU (MHU) with RF Deconsolidation (or any other option?). The scenario is, i PGR material and material is autopacked with BOXES. I have POSC setup to automaticaly move the Box HUs to WorkCenter for "deconsolidation" and autocreate additional B task for putaway box. Now I have preprinted empty MHUs (pallet HUs) and would like somehow to pack the Boxes under preprinted MHU. 

I tried with /scwm/dcons first - it allows me to generate new MHU, I can drag and drop the BOX HU under this MHU and Im able to close the MHU - the WT change to active but the HU in the WH is still the box HU. So its possible somehow regenerate the task for MHU with RF Mobile device? (like I scan the source Box HU, scan destination empty MHU and box HU will be nested under MHU and task will change to MHU putaway. Next I will scan the next box MHU as source, the MHU as destination...... Once I putaway, it will putaway MHU with all boxes)

entry.title: Re: CBC 2SL customer using CLT service
entry.content:
Hi @Helinna,

CLT is available as  Early Adopter feature for customers selected as eligible for the program. 2SL systems are no longer provisioned and existing customers will be converted to 3SL

Please propose your customer in the review Central Business Configuration - EA program applications for create customer local version  and if thy are accepted thy will receive the necessary documentation to use the functionality.

Regards,

Lucian

entry.title: Advanced Financial Closing: Change communication system
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I had started in an AFC project and now the question arised how / if we can change the communication system of our template from test system to productiv system. Is there a better option than just manually create a new task list with our 300+ tasks?

Within the define task list I can only add systems but I cannot copy the existing folders to the new system.

@SAPSupport 

Thank you for your help.

Regards,

entry.title: Re: SAP Community - Where are you from?
entry.content:
Hello sveabecker

I'm looking for SAP Manufacturing execution community. Do you know the group I could connect? Thanks in advance and have a nice day.

Regards

entry.title: expiration date - open coli
entry.content:
For specific raw materials there is an expiration date in the system, which reflects the expiration date for a coli which have not been opened. When the coli has been opened the expiration date is reduced. So in a planning scenario it will be difficult to estimate how much to purchase, which depends on if the open coli can be used in process orders before it expire.

How to control this in SAP?

Br. sune

entry.title: SAP CAP - Could not work with on-premise remote odata service via destination - 401 authentication
entry.content:
Hi all,

I have a CAP framework based application which is intended to connect to a remote service via destination (on-premise odata v2 service).

The name of the destination is MyDest1.

The contents of the package.json are as below:

 

 

"cds": {
    "requires": {
      "ZGW_MY_SRV": {
        "kind": "odata-v2",
        "model": "srv/my-service",
        "[sandbox]": {
          "credentials": {
            "path": "/sap/opu/odata/sap/ZGW_MY_SRV",
            "destination": "MyDest1"
          }
        },
        "[production]": {
          "credentials": {
            "path": "/sap/opu/odata/sap/ZGW_MY_SRV",
            "destination": "MyDest1"
          }
        }
      },
      "auth": "xsuaa",
      "destinations": true,
      "connectivity": true,
      "[production]": {
        "connectivity": true,
        "auth": "xsuaa",
        "destinations": true
      }
    }
  }

 

 

 

The mta.yaml:

 

 

_schema-version: '3.1'
ID: MyCAP-nodejs
version: 1.0.0
description: "MyCAP-CAPM-NodeJS"
parameters:
  enable-parallel-deployments: true
build-parameters:
  before-all:
    - builder: custom
      commands:
        - npm ci
        - npx cds build --production
modules:
  - name: MyCAP-nodejs-srv
    type: nodejs
    path: gen/srv
    parameters:
      buildpack: nodejs_buildpack
      readiness-health-check-type: http
      readiness-health-check-http-endpoint: /health
      enable-ssh: true
    build-parameters:
      builder: npm
    provides:
      - name: srv-api # required by consumers of CAP services (e.g. approuter)
        properties:
          srv-url: ${default-url}
    requires:
      - name: MyCAPnodejs-connectivity
      - name: MyCAPnodejs-destination
      - name: MyCAPnodejs-auth

  - name: MyCAP-nodejs
    type: approuter.nodejs
    path: app/router
    parameters:
      enable-ssh: true
      keep-existing-routes: true
      disk-quota: 256M
      memory: 256M
    requires:
      - name: srv-api
        group: destinations
        properties:
          name: srv-api # must be used in xs-app.json as well
          url: ~{srv-url}
          forwardAuthToken: true
      - name: MyCAPnodejs-auth

resources:
  - name: MyCAPnodejs-connectivity
    type: org.cloudfoundry.managed-service
    parameters:
      service: connectivity
      service-plan: lite
  - name: MyCAPnodejs-destination
    type: org.cloudfoundry.managed-service
    parameters:
      service: destination
      service-plan: lite
  - name: MyCAPnodejs-auth
    type: org.cloudfoundry.managed-service
    parameters:
      service: xsuaa
      service-plan: application
      path: ./xs-security.json
      config:
        xsappname: MyCAP-nodejs-${org}-${space}
        tenant-mode: dedicated

 

 

 

.env file contains a destinations as a variable:

 

 

destinations=[{ "name": "MyDest1", "url": "http://MyDest1.dest", "proxyConfiguration":{ "host": "127.0.0.1", "port": 8887, "protocol":"http" } }]

 

 

 

.cdsrc-private.json:

 

 

{
  "requires": {
    "[hybrid]": {
      "auth": {
        "binding": {
          "type": "cf",
          "apiEndpoint": "https://api.cf.eu10.hana.ondemand.com",
          "org": "MyOrg-fiori",
          "space": "DevSpace",
          "instance": "MyCAPnodejs-auth",
          "key": "default",
          "resolved": false
        },
        "kind": "xsuaa-auth",
        "vcap": {
          "name": "auth"
        }
      },
      "ZGW_DevSpace_SRV": {
        "credentials": {
          "path": "/sap/opu/odata/sap/ZGW_MY_SRV",
          "destination": "MyDest1"
        }
      },
      "destinations": {
        "binding": {
          "type": "cf",
          "apiEndpoint": "https://api.cf.eu10.hana.ondemand.com",
          "org": "MyOrg-fiori",
          "space": "DevSpace",
          "instance": "MyCAPnodejs-destination",
          "key": "MyCAPnodejs-destination-key",
          "resolved": false
        },
        "kind": "destinations",
        "vcap": {
          "name": "destinations"
        }
      },
      "custom-service:MyCAPnodejs-connectivity": {
        "binding": {
          "type": "cf",
          "apiEndpoint": "https://api.cf.eu10.hana.ondemand.com",
          "org": "MyOrg-fiori",
          "space": "DevSpace",
          "instance": "MyCAPnodejs-connectivity",
          "key": "default",
          "resolved": false
        },
        "vcap": {
          "name": "custom-service:MyCAPnodejs-connectivity"
        }
      }
    }
  }
}

 

my-service.js:

const cds = require('@sap/cds');
module.exports = cds.service.impl(async function() {
    const bupa = await cds.connect.to('ZGW_MY_SRV');
  
    this.on('READ', ['EntityA', 'EntityB'], async (req) => {
        try {
            const result = await bupa.run(req.query);
            return result
        } catch(error) {
            console.error("Error accessing destination:", error);
            // throw new Error("Failed to access data from destination.");
            req.error(502, `Gateway error: ${error.message}`);
        }
    });
});

If I run the application in Business Application Studio (BAS) using commands:

cf login -a https://api.cf.eu10.hana.ondemand.com/ --sso and cds watch --profile hybrid,
it works as in if I click on the entity from the previewed services in the new tab, I get the data from the on premise system via destination and the same gets logged to the BAS terminal:

 

[2024-05-11T10:48:58.004Z] INFO     (env-destination-accessor): Successfully retrieved destination 'MyDest1' from environment variable.

 

However once deployment to the BTP cloud foundry space, it throws an error message as 401 Unauthorized.

 

 
In the apps that I access via cf logs <myapp-srv> --recent, I could see the URL I am maintaining in the destination in axios error logs.
I believe the CAP library is able to get the URL but not performing the authentication based on the method, username and password provided in the destination.
 
Need help.

entry.title: Re: Connectivity guaranteed with Cloud Integration versio...
entry.content: Hello Markus san, Thank you very much for advise. I understood. I strongly recommend this to the partner. Regards, Takuya Nezu

entry.title: Re: Connectivity guaranteed with Cloud Integration versio...
entry.content: Hello Ulrich san, Thank you very much. I understood this.

entry.title: Re: Error of Posting Period while making AP invoice
entry.content:
Hi,

Primarily, if you have already in process of creating a document and/or running a report and an error occurs, be it account not defined or posting period locked, there is a possibility that even after the definition is fixed by the user but still the already opened document or report will still display the same error.

The usual course of action in this case is to close the report selection criteria, or cancel the Invoice and re-create the same after the changes to the definition are made.

Check in demo.

Kr,

Jitin

entry.title: Re: Custom Fields and Logics - Create and Capturing the Changes into Transport Request
entry.content: Awesome! Thank you so much for sharing it!

entry.title: Re: ABAP server slowness problem
entry.content:
Hello,

I would start an analysis with ST06 > Top 40 CPU processes.

Kind regards

Jan

entry.title: Re: SAP Marketing Cloud - Data Import Error "Contact with...
entry.content:
Hello Rebeca,

which API Version of service API_MKT_CONTACT_SRV are you using?
Version 3 or 4?

Please keep in mind, that when you load permission data via the service API_MKT_CONTACT_SRV, the AdditionalIDs need to be loaded in addition. 
With API version 3 you can provide the email address with entity ContactOriginData.
In API version 4 you need to provide the email address with entity AdditionalID.

If you don't provide the email as AdditionalID, then you get the error "Contact with ID &1 does not have ID &2".
If you provide the email as AdditionalID, but you still get the error, then the format of the email address is probably not supported. Then the payload of the AdditionalID fails (then you should also have another error in the Data Load Monitor for that) and therefore the permission record cannot be created.

Please check out the following page for the email validation:
Validation Checks for Email and Phone Numbers | SAP Help Portal

Br,
Ja

entry.title: Re: SAP Community - Where are you from?
entry.content:
Hi @Dany2 there is the SAP for Industrial Manufacturing Group, which you might want to join. Furthermore, there are a lot of tags around manufacturing, which you can check via this link: https://community.sap.com/t5/forums/searchpage/tab/product?q=sap+manufacturing 

Please subscribe to the tags, which are most suitable. You can also search on your own for other community tags here: https://community.sap.com/t5/all-sap-managed-tags/ct-p/managed-tags

entry.title: Disable Custom Field in VA02
entry.content:
Hello,

I have custom fields in Tab "Custom Fields" in VA02, added implemented through "Custom Fields and Logic". How can I disable Input for these fields?
USEREXIT_FIELD_MODIFICATION does not appear to trigger for the Custom Fields Tab.

entry.title: Re: abap2UI5 - (2) Displaying Selection Screens & Tables
entry.content: Yes abap2UI5 only uses UI5 Controls to create views at the frontend, therefore it is responsive and you can also follow the Fiori Design Guidelines, check for example: https://experience.sap.com/fiori-design-web/responsiveness-adaptiveness/

entry.title: Re: Easy way to access OData services via btp destinations in a python flask app
entry.content:
Hi Colleague,

I created one flask app in the BTP could foundry environment, it always failed when HTTP request to invoke the S4 API.

I had followed your solution to create the destination and cloud connector, all the connection is working.

Could you please help to check the issue i posted in https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/a-python-flask-app-sends-the-http-request-failed-to-invoke-a-s4-odata-v4/qaq-p/13697504#M4828970

Best Regards, Javy

entry.title: Re: Enabling your workforce for the future with the new integrated learning experience
entry.content:
@elissavereeken 

When you assign a curriculum to yourself, you would see the items required for completion of that curriculum show up under "Invest in myself". Items that are not required for completion of that curriculum would not show up as part of the learnings you need to complete, but they will show in this section if you had started them or registered for example (that is, you had already started engaging with the item). 

Hope this clarifies.  

Please see the linked documentation "transition guide" and "rules" above, as they detail the logic of the different sections of the new home page.

entry.title: Re: How do you like new SAP Community pages (Blogs) look & feel?
entry.content:
Hello @craigcmehil 

Is there a more formal process e.g. a thread or a discussion where feedback and improvement proposals are collected?

entry.title: Re: How do you like new SAP Community pages (Blogs) look & feel?
entry.content:
Hi @DominikTylczyn to enlarge the comment window, have you tried to extend the window with the little triangle at the lower right corner? That was the same feature in wordpress in former blogs.sap.com.

I also think the search is much better. When I search for Stammtisch a lot of results show up or even when I simply search for a city, there are great results (2nd screenshot):

You can fine tune with choosing "user", "places" and "SAP managed tags".

Not sure why it is not working for you though.

entry.title: Re: Subtitution Doesn't Replace Pre-existing Work schedul...
entry.content:
Hi,

For Dynamic Daily Work Schedule assignment, configuration done in  view V_T552V with associated help in IMG node "Assign Daily Work Schedule Dynamically" in transaction SPRO.

Also see standard PCR TD30

Brendan

entry.title: Re: How do you like new SAP Community pages (Blogs) look & feel?
entry.content:
Not at this time, as you can probably imagine we have feedback coming from multiple different segments of the audience and instead of asking everyone to go to one particular place that we have to setup we are currently working with whatever way people send it to us from threads here to emails, to private messages as well as via the SAP Champions  and our own internal channels for those focused on the Community.

A more formal way will be coming but it will need to come with the next round of UI/UX changes which are also required for the new EU laws being implemented around accessibility. Just as several other areas we have had to focus on are related to the EU DSA laws.

entry.title: Re: Disable Custom Field in VA02
entry.content:
Hello @Victorvk 

As this is a custom field implemented with a custom logic, then the custom logic is solely responsible for the field status i.e. activation/deactivation. 

Best regards

Dominik Tylczynski

entry.title: Re: sender error
entry.content:
Hi laplap 

Please check SAP note  3460496 for the issue faced.

Issue is fixed in feature Package 2408 SAP Business One 10.0.

Thank You.

Kind Regards
Nidhi Singh
SAP Business One Support

entry.title: Re: How do you like new SAP Community pages (Blogs) look & feel?
entry.content:
Hi @sveabecker 

The comment on a question is initially limited to one line only and there is not way to enlarge it. Also there are not edit options:

Only once a comment is posted, I can edit it and get large window with all edit options.

 

Regarding events filtering - there is no way to filter events by locations in the events list, only by event status and labels:

Cheers

Dominik

entry.title: Mac SSO
entry.content:
Hello,
We have a couple of Mac users in our company who would like to have SSO in the SAP GUI, but unfortunately I have not found how they can issue themselves an SSO certificate, do you have any experience with this?

entry.title: Re: Item 001 Order Z02401230001 budget exceeded at the ti...
entry.content:
Hello Satish if you change it to warning message system will not stop user in MIGO/ML81N even if no budget available.

For budget profile & availalibity control refer below blog.

https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-blogs-by-members/create-budget-profile-and-activate-availability-control/ba-p/13284459

Regards,

Sumesh Gupta

entry.title: Re: Add a Service or Entitlement in SAP BTP Trial Account
entry.content:
Very good post @mohit_dev , thanks, very imformative and clear. 

I found it while I am stuck, being unable to add SAP AI sevices. I tried to get it added to available services from entitlement, but simply unable to find it. Can you or someone please hint, what might be the reason. Pic FYR. Also FYI, Server is selected as USA, and this problem persists in both Singapore and USA, AWS and Azure servers.

entry.title: Re: Homogeneous DMO and DMOVE2S4
entry.content: @Boris_Rubarth  I have one small question. Is there any specific restriction that you are aware of, if we perform a homogeneous migration  using backup and restore of BW4HANA2023 on-premise to RISE ?   One of the customer is skeptical on this as-in migration to RISE and hence the question.

entry.title: Re: How do you like new SAP Community pages (Blogs) look & feel?
entry.content: Okay, got it - you referred to Q&A. That's true, I see also only this smaller one line window. And in regards to filter, it's true as well. You were firstly referring to "search" - I think, the search is great. Filter option is missing though. Maybe you try "search" instead.

entry.title: How to select other user name in outgoing payment draft without assign superuser to user account
entry.content: User A created an outgoing payment draft document, and user B need to verify and post it. But when user B open outgoing payment draft report, the user field is grey out and not able to select user A name. User B is professional license and been given full authorization in draft doc.
